# spectrocloud_ippool (Data Source)

  Data source for looking up a private cloud gateway IP pool by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "spectrocloud_ippool" "example" {
  name                     = "ippool-1"
  private_cloud_gateway_id = "pcg-uid"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the IP pool.
- `private_cloud_gateway_id` (String) The ID of the private cloud gateway.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
